title: Objective policy
subtitle: How much the system decides on its own — the autonomy boundary.

tier1.label: Tier-1 auto-commit confidence (%)
tier1.read: Auto-apply predicted parameter changes at ≥ {{pct}}% confidence; below, queue for review.

tier2.label: Tier 2 — soft policies
tier2.advisoryRead: Advisory-first: proposes adjustments for a human to accept.
tier2.boundedRead: Bounded auto: high-confidence changes apply within configured bounds (still audited).

tier3.label: Tier 3 — hard / commercial / safety
tier3.read: Always human, regardless of confidence — the trust-envelope floor.

tuning.title: Predictive tuning
tuning.subtitle: Leave a field blank to use the safe default.
tuning.wearLabel: Wear band — flag at % over standard (default 5)
tuning.wearRead: Flag a tool-wear forecast when the cycle is predicted ≥ {{pct}}% over standard.
tuning.deltaLabel: Snooze — re-ask on confidence rise, points (default 15)
tuning.deltaRead: A snoozed forecast returns when confidence rises ≥ {{pts}} points above where it was set aside.
tuning.hoursRead: A snoozed forecast returns when the predicted crossing falls within {{h}}h.
tuning.invalidWear: Enter a positive % up to 200, or blank for the default.
tuning.invalidDelta: Enter 0–100, or blank for the default.
tuning.invalidHours: Enter a positive number of hours, or blank for the default.

objectives.title: Objective weights & priority
objectives.seam: Service floor · max OT · churn tolerance · expedite premium, and customer priority tiers — Phase 5.
